description:
Decode 3 provided QR code image files by sequentially loading them into the OBS Virtual Camera so bcWebCam can scan them, and save the extracted URLs into a single text file.

Expected Actions:
1. Open OBS Studio and locate the existing Image source (or create a new Image source) in the current scene.
2. Change the Image source file path to display `equip_1.png` located in `C:\Users\Docker\Documents\offline_codes\`.
3. Switch focus to bcWebCam, allowing it to scan the virtual camera feed.
4. Copy the decoded text (a GS1 URL) from bcWebCam's output window.
5. Paste the decoded text into a new text file.
6. Repeat steps 2-5 for `equip_2.png` and `equip_3.png`.
7. Save the final text file to `C:\Users\Docker\Documents\equipment_ids.txt`. Each URL must be on a new line.

Note: You MUST use bcWebCam and OBS to perform the decoding. Bypassing the applications using online decoders or custom scripts will fail verification.
